message:
feat(btree,vdbe): integrate SwissIndex SIMD hash map into VdbeEngine and MemDatabase (bd-3ta.7)

Replace std::collections::HashMap with SwissIndex (hashbrown-backed) in
VdbeEngine and MemDatabase for SIMD-accelerated index lookups with
integrated observability. Extended SwissIndex API with get_mut,
entry_or_insert_with, values, Index trait, and iterator impls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
